changeSet.author: cherevko
changeSet.sql: WITH Graphs AS ( SELECT graph_id FROM dbo.graph ), NodeNumbers AS ( SELECT 1 AS n UNION ALL SELECT n + 1 FROM NodeNumbers WHERE n < 5 ) INSERT INTO dbo.Nodes (graph_id, name, pos_x, pos_y, color) SELECT g.graph_id, CONCAT(N'Node_', g.graph_id, '_', n), CAST((g.graph_id * 10 + n * 5) AS FLOAT), CAST((g.graph_id * 5 + n * 10) AS FLOAT), CASE n WHEN 1 THEN '#FF0000' WHEN 2 THEN '#00FF00' ELSE '#0000FF' END FROM Graphs g CROSS JOIN NodeNumbers OPTION (MAXRECURSION 10);

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM dbo.Nodes WHERE name IN ( 'Root_Node', 'Child_A', 'Child_B', 'Vertex_1', 'Vertex_2', 'Decision_Root', 'Module_Core', 'Module_Auth', 'Router_Main', 'Gateway_In', 'Street_Intersection', 'Entrance_Gate', 'Player_Spawn', 'User_Profile_A', 'User_Profile_B', 'Cloud_Bucket', 'Wallet_Source', 'Wallet_Target', 'Metric_CPU', 'Lab_Task_1', 'Concept_Node', 'URL_Root', 'Sensor_Temp', 'Warehouse_A', 'Bus_Stop_Centre', 'Neuron_Main' );
